_comment: GitHub Projects v2 board definition for the Agentic SDLC workflow. Import via gh CLI or manually. ADR: ADR-0052 | Spec: docs/process/SPRINT-TRACKING.md
title: Agentic SDLC Sprint Board
description: 5-view board covering the full 13-phase Agentic SDLC lifecycle.

views.name: Backlog
views.description: Feature funnel — Discovery through Ready. Product Owner manages this view.

views.name: Sprint Board
views.description: Active sprint work — used in daily standup. Filter by current milestone.

views.name: Security Debt
views.description: Security issues by priority. Security Lead reviews weekly. CRITICAL items block release.

views.name: Release Tracker
views.description: Release readiness tracking. Release Manager view. Feeds DoR-Release checklist.

views.name: DORA Dashboard
views.description: Read-only DORA proxy view. For precise metrics use Grafana: infrastructure/monitoring/grafana/dora-metrics.json

filters.name: Deployment Frequency
filters.description: Issues closed per week (proxy for features shipped)

filters.name: Hotfixes (Change Failure)
filters.description: Hotfix issues as proportion of total closed

filters.name: P0 Incidents (MTTR proxy)
filters.description: P0 issues — lead time from open to close approximates MTTR

views.note: Lead time and MTTR calculations require the Grafana DORA dashboard for accuracy. This view provides quick team visibility only.

setup_instructions: 1. Create a GitHub Projects v2 project in your organisation or repository.
2. Add the required labels from labels_required (use .github/labels.yml as reference).
3. Create the 5 views manually using the filters defined above, or use the gh CLI:
gh project create --owner @me --title 'Agentic SDLC Sprint Board'
4. Enable the issue-lifecycle.yml workflow to automate label transitions.
5. See docs/process/SPRINT-TRACKING.md for full cadence and team-size guidance.
